item.title: Blogging Setup
item.author: anumeyasehgal@proton.me (Anumeya)
item.description:
HUGO is one of the most popular Open Source tools for static site generation which is being heavily used for blogs (like this one) and docs. It boasts some extreme speeds with nearly all websites getting rendered in “less than a second”. Added to this is a fast-growing community of users and developers and a thriving selection of community themes and many other features.

I am mostly focused on attempting to understand the working and reasons why HUGO is where it is right now but have added a section on how to setup a blog similar to this one using HUGO and Github Pages. For those interested in setting up something similar for yourselves, feel free to skip to setup
